California
Fair POlitical
Practices Cornmission
August 22, L99O
Conny B. Ilccormack
Registrar of voters
county of San Diego
5201 Ruffin Road, Suite 1
San Diego, cA 92123
Re: Your Request for Advice
our File No. A-90-497
Dear IIs. llccormack:
we have received your letter of July 25, 7990 in which you
seek advice regarding your duties and responsibil ities as the
Registrar of voters for San Diego county under the nass nailing
pr6visions of the Political nefonn Act (the rastrr1.1
OUESTION
Your office publishes and distributes a 'tDirectory of Public
officialsr 
and a I'Media Kit." 
In light of Proposition 732, are
you permitted to include a llsting of the members of the county's
Board of Supervisors on the back cover of these publications?
CONCLUSION
You nay include a roster listing the nanes of the menbers of
the county's Board of Supervisors on the back cover of these
publications, provided certain requirenents are met.
1 co.r".rrr"nt Code Sections 81OOO-91015. Al,1 statutory references
are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. 
Conmi.ssion
regulations appear at 2 california code of Regulations Sectj.on
18000, et g.eq. AlI references to regulations are to Title 2, Di-
vision 6 of the California Code of Reg"ulations.
.,- Your inguiry also included reference to Proposition 68. The
nass nailing provisions at issue in your question are found in
Proposition 73i there are no comparable provisions in Proposition
68.
428 J Street, Suite 80O . P.O. Box 8O7 o Sacramento CA 958O4.O8O7 o (916) 322-5660


Fil,e No. A-9o-497
Page 2
FACTS
Your office biennially publishes a directory of public
officials. 
The directory includes federal and state offices and
officeholders, members of the legislature who represent the
county, county and incorporated city offices, and school and
speci-I districts. 
other information concerning election dates,
county facts, and addresses and telephone numbers of general
interest are also provided.
Your office also publishes a media kit which is produced and
distributed prior to each rrmajortr election. 
The nedia kit con-
tains infornition concerning election statistics, 
campaign disclo-
sure, sanple ballots, polls locati.on, absentee voting, election
night vote tabulation, baIlot propositions, and an election
handbook.
Attached to your letter requesting advice were copies of the
nedia kit and directory of public offi.cials.
ANALYSIS
Section 82041.5 defines a nass nailing as more than 200 sub-
stantially similar pieces of nail. 
Section 89001 prohibits a
newslettei or other mass rnailing fron being sent at public
expense .
Regulation 18901 (copy enclosed) inplenents Sectiorl 890o1 and
clarifits 
that the purpose of the nass mailing restriction is to
prevent elected officeis from using public funds to further their
candidacy for reelection by sending out newsletters and other Bass
rnailings. (Krannalritter Advice Letter, No. A-90-300, Svmkowick
Advice Letter, No. I-88-399, copies enclosed.)
Regulation 18901(b) (1) provides in part that a newsletter or
other nass nailing is not prohibited by Section 89001 if
... the elected officer's 
nane appears ... in a
roster listing containingr the nanes of aII elected
officers of the agency. In any such items, the
nanes of all elected officers must aPpear in the
sane tlrpe size, tlrpeface, type color, and location.
Such iten may not include the elected officer's
photograph, signature, or any other reference to
the elected officer, except as specifically
pennitted in subdivision (b) (1) or elsewhere in
this regiulation.
Regulation 18901(b) (1) .
A roster listing that contains the nanes of the elected mem-
bers of the board of supervisors in the sane t)rpef ace, size, and
location would therefore appear to be in conpliance rrith the nass


File No. A-9o-49'7
Page 3
nailing provisions of the Act. 
(steffan Advice Letter, No.
A 90 053; Biondo Advice Letter, No. A-89-o22, copies - enclosed. )
rhis wouia be egually applicable to both the rnedia kit and the
directory of officials.
I trust this tetter has provided you rith the gruidance you
requested. If you have any further guestions regarding this mat-
ter, please contact De at (916) 322-59OL-
sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
Counsel, Legal Division
SH:JSR:Plh
Enclosures
′
